step1.title: Upload Contract

step2.title: AI Clause-by-Clause Review
step2.desc: Our LLM scans the full text, flagging high-risk clauses: indemnification, non-compete, auto-renewal, unilateral termination, IP ownership, and more.

step3.title: Report & Recommendations
step3.desc: A clear risk score + clause-by-clause breakdown + suggested edits. Copy and send to the other party — negotiate with confidence.

items.q: Is my contract secure and private?
items.a: Uploaded files are used only for the current scan and are immediately deleted from our servers afterward. All transfers are HTTPS-encrypted. We never store, view, or reuse your contract content.

items.q: How accurate is the AI? Can it replace a lawyer?
items.a: Our AI covers 10+ risk categories including indemnification, non-compete, auto-renewal, and IP ownership. Internal tests show over 90% detection of high-risk clauses. However, it is not a lawyer — for high-stakes contracts, always consult a licensed attorney.
PDF (text-based, not scanned images), DOCX (Word), and TXT plain text. Image OCR is not yet supported.

items.q: What are the Free tier limits?
items.a: 5 free scans per month, up to 12,000 characters each. Includes risk scoring and clause flagging, but no PDF export. Perfect for everyday contracts.

items.q: How long does a scan take?
items.a: Most scans complete within 10-30 seconds, depending on contract length. You'll see real-time progress as the AI reviews your document clause by clause.

items.q: Will my data be used to train AI models?
items.a: No. We use OpenAI's API under their business data protection terms. Your contract content is never used to train or improve AI models — not by us, not by OpenAI.

items.q: Can I cancel my Pro subscription anytime?
items.a: Yes, absolutely. Cancel anytime from your account page — no questions asked, no cancellation fees. You'll retain Pro access until the end of your billing period.

items.q: What types of contracts work best?
items.a: Employment agreements, lease contracts, service agreements, NDAs, freelance contracts, and partnership agreements all work great. The AI is trained on a wide range of commercial and consumer contract types.
上传的文件仅用于本次扫描，扫描完成后立即从服务器删除。全程 HTTPS 加密传输，不存储任何合同内容。
AI 能覆盖赔偿条款、竞业限制、自动续约、知识产权归属等常见风险点。但它不是律师，仅供参考，涉及重大利益的合同仍建议咨询专业律师。
PDF（文字型，非扫描件图片）、DOCX（Word 文档）、TXT 纯文本。暂不支持图片 OCR。
每月 5 次免费扫描，每次最多 12,000 字，不含 PDF 报告导出。日常小合同完全够用。
